mapper.select: select notice_id, notice_title, notice_content, notice_type, status, is_top, community_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from community_notice where notice_id = #{noticeId}
mapper.update: update community_notice set notice_title = #{noticeTitle}, notice_content = #{noticeContent}, notice_type = #{noticeType}, status = #{status}, is_top = #{isTop}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, publisher = #{publisher}, community_id = #{communityId}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where notice_id = #{noticeId}
mapper.delete: -- delete from community_notice where notice_id = #{noticeId} DELETE FROM community_notice WHERE notice_id IN (${noticeIds})
